# category: annoyances
# generated by categorize from filters.txt headers
#
# ── REMOVED (too aggressive — break site functionality) ──────────────────
# REMOVED: BrowseWebsitesWithoutLoggingIn.txt — hides login walls, breaks login/register flows
# REMOVED: AdVoid.Addon.NoExternals.txt — blocks ALL external resources, massively breaks sites
# REMOVED: AdVoid.Addon.NoExtras.txt — aggressively blocks third-party content, breaks embeds
# REMOVED: ThaiParanoidBlock/maximum — "maximum paranoid" blocking, too aggressive for general use
# REMOVED: soteria-nou/widgets.txt — blocks all widget domains, breaks legitimate widgets
# REMOVED: chat-annoyances.txt — hides all chat widgets, including legitimate customer support
# REMOVED: ShadowWhisperer/BlockLists/Ads — unmaintained, overly broad rules
# REMOVED: kano1/badway.txt — overly aggressive, undocumented rules
# REMOVED: orca.pet/notonmyshift — aggressive anti-annoyance that breaks interactive elements
# REMOVED: bjornstar/hosts — unmaintained hosts file, causes false positives
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#
